creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 193589
svn diff for www/mod_proxy_uwsgi

```
www/mod_proxy_uwsgi: Delete after apache24 merge

 - Module is part of www/apache24 as of 2.4.30
   see https://github.com/unbit/uwsgi/issues/1636
   and https://svn.apache.org/viewvc?view=revision&revision=1810358

PR:
Approved by: (maintainer)
```

Currently this module has an install conflict with www/apache24.
If you see there's still reason to keep a separate port for this
please supply a patch that fixes the conflict (see 
www/mod_http2-devel as an example).

Thanks for maintaining the port!
